error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DMI Radar API

user.title: Add DMI Radar Precipitation
user.description:
Estimate local precipitation from DMI radar composites.

If setup fails, details: {error_detail}

init.title: DMI Radar Precipitation Options
init.description:
Adjust how often radar data is fetched.

Backfill is disabled by default. If you enable it, Home Assistant will gradually download and process many historical radar files. Depending on the selected time span, this can take a long time and trigger many downloads before the history is complete.
